summary.zh: 从输入坐标扩散轻量波纹，提供明确的触点反馈。
summary.en: Expand a restrained ripple from the input coordinate for precise touch feedback.

definition.zh: 圆形从轻触点向外扩散，用来确认按压操作。
definition.en: A radial wave expands from the activation coordinates to mark where contact occurred.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

purpose.zh: 从真实输入坐标扩散轻量涟漪，明确触点和按压确认。
purpose.en: Expand a restrained ripple from the actual input coordinate to confirm the touch point.

frequency.zh: 适合中频、大面积触控目标；高密度桌面控件可采用更轻的按压反馈。
frequency.en: Use for medium-frequency, larger touch targets; dense desktop controls can use lighter press feedback.

trigger.zh: 由 pointerdown 触发，圆心取相对控件的输入坐标。
trigger.en: Trigger on pointerdown, positioning the center from coordinates relative to the control.

enterExit.zh: 涟漪从触点扩散并淡出，完成后移除节点；控件本身保持稳定。
enterExit.en: Expand and fade from the touch point, removing the ripple node afterward while the control stays stable.

interruptibility.zh: 重复点击允许多个涟漪独立完成，并限制并发节点数量。
interruptibility.en: Allow repeated presses to finish independently while capping concurrent ripple nodes.

gestureRules.zh: 键盘激活从控件中心产生等价反馈；涟漪层不得拦截指针事件。
gestureRules.en: Keyboard activation uses the control center, and the ripple layer never intercepts pointer events.

reducedMotion.zh: 取消扩散，保留即时背景色或描边变化。
reducedMotion.en: Remove expansion and keep an immediate background or outline change.

reviewNotes.zh: 在圆角和 overflow 裁切下检查边界。
reviewNotes.en: Check clipping against border radius and overflow.

reviewNotes.zh: 确保涟漪对比足够可见且不会遮挡标签。
reviewNotes.en: Keep the ripple visible without obscuring the label.
